_doc: Single source of truth for every company fact on the site. Nothing about the business may be hardcoded anywhere else. A field that is null has no verified source yet, and every consumer must treat null as 'do not render' rather than substituting a placeholder.
_licensingNote: Massachusetts does NOT license cleaning or janitorial companies, so no page may claim to be 'MA Licensed'. The MA HIC number previously shown was a Home Improvement Contractor licence, which covers residential construction rather than environmental services, and the client asked for it to be removed site-wide (commit 0206a50c2). Insurance is the honest and equally strong credential.
_ratingNote: Real, confirmed against the Google Business Profile by the owner: 4.7 average, 10 reviews. The GHL review widget only surfaces one self-authored entry, which is why this must come from company.json, not that widget.

certifications._note: MBE/WBE are formal certification terms. Until a certificate number is confirmed, the site says only 'Black-owned and women-owned business' and never the acronyms.

ghl._loadingNote: Load EAGERLY. Deferring these iframes has already been tried (commit 4c9fe8d43) and lead capture stopped entirely — 2,083 iframes across 1,788 pages had to be reverted in 46d430cc4. Reserve height via CSS to control CLS instead of deferring the load.
